title: Calcearia bryophila
taxonomy: Calcearia bryophila is classified as a species of freshwater snail, belonging to the family Lymnaeidae. This classification is based on its shell morphology and other physical characteristics. Calcearia bryophila is a member of the genus Calcearia, which is part of the class Gastropoda. As a gastropod mollusk, it is also classified as a type of pulmonate snail. The Lymnaeidae family, to which Calcearia bryophila belongs, is primarily composed of aquatic snails.
